# render-detail

Renders the contributions facet as a section in the plugin detail pane: the
plugin's own static contributions (slot + derived id) plus a "Slot contributors"
list (other plugins that contribute to this plugin's slots).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Per-plugin contributions section in the plugin detail pane.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginViewSlots.Section` "contributions" → `ContributionsDetailSection`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
